option.name: text
option.value: welcome, from now on can you implement changes that i tell you, dont make any other changes if it tell you not to, everytime you finish the task make a small list of technikal changes onther the hood and another of what should be changed for the user, and the request is not presice enoth then dont change any code but ask for more information. Everything related to the look should be inspierd by "Material you 3 Expressive" designe here is a link to the main info page about it "https://m3.material.io/blog/building-with-m3-expressive". Scan this project get as many importent things memorized and get confertable with this projects layout and functionality
